name: Emma Frost | The Hellfire Gala
description:
"Diamonds are forever..."

. · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · .

After the long fights against the two doom's and the mess with Dracula and Moon Knights $5 it seems like now you and the rest of the hero's finally got a well deserved break at the Hellfire Gala, only issue? You're a nobody as of now and cant exactly fraternize with the big shots quite yet. Surprisingly though the star of the show herself, Emma Frost, decided to approach you of all people.

Okay I know her gameplay trailer and the season trailer and stuff just came out today, but she was too good to pass up on, plus LOOK AT HER LEGS GOD DAYUMM, but besides that I also felt like I was sort of lacking on my promise of making bots, but I mean what else is new.

Anyways, the image comes straight from the trailer so go check it out if your a rivals player and somehow didn't see it.

(TEASER FOR THE NEXT BOT BTW)

Now I don't know how you guys feel about me doing another Emma Frost bot back to back, buuuuut she's like really hot so I'm gonna do it anyways.

Also, if I get one more comment asking for some variation of a bot I made again I'm actually gonna blow

ANYWAY BAIIIII
